title: Remove .PHP Extension from URLs
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want URLs to not show the .PHP extension so that the application feels more polished and professional.
description: Remove the .PHP file extension from application URLs. This provides cleaner URLs and hides implementation details from end users.
acceptance_criteria: URLs do not display the .PHP extension
All internal links use extension-less URLs
Server correctly routes extension-less URLs to the correct PHP files
No broken links or navigation issues
ux_changes: URLs no longer show .PHP extension, providing cleaner navigation.
implementation_notes: Implemented via server URL rewriting rules to strip .php extensions.
comment_summary: Developer implemented and submitted for review. Product owner reviewed and confirmed it looks good.
